mapper.sql: empID, workNo, name, eName, compID, depID, jobID, reportTo, wfreportTo, empStatus, jobStatus, empType, joinDate, workBeginDate, jobBeginDate, pracBeginDate, pracEndDate, probBeginDate, probEndDate, leaveDate, gender, email, mobile, officePhone, remark, disabled, empCustom1, empCustom2, empCustom3, empCustom4, empCustom5
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_employee (workNo, name, eName, compID, depID, jobID, reportTo, wfreportTo, empStatus, jobStatus, empType, joinDate, workBeginDate, jobBeginDate, pracBeginDate, pracEndDate, probBeginDate, probEndDate, leaveDate, gender, email, mobile, officePhone, remark, disabled, empCustom1, empCustom2, empCustom3, empCustom4, empCustom5 ) values (#{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{joinDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{jobBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pracBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pracEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{probBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{probEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leaveDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gender,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disabled,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_employee
workNo,
name,
eName,
compID,
depID,
jobID,
reportTo,
wfreportTo,
empStatus,
jobStatus,
empType,
joinDate,
workBeginDate,
jobBeginDate,
pracBeginDate,
pracEndDate,
probBeginDate,
probEndDate,
leaveDate,
gender,
email,
mobile,
officePhone,
remark,
disabled,
empCustom1,
empCustom2,
empCustom3,
empCustom4,
empCustom5,

mapper.update:
update ehr_employee
workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eName = #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reportTo = #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empStatus = #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobStatus = #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empType = #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
joinDate = #{joinDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
workBeginDate = #{workBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
jobBeginDate = #{jobBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pracBeginDate = #{pracBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pracEndDate = #{pracEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
probBeginDate = #{probBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
probEndDate = #{probEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
leaveDate = #{leaveDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=INTEGER},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
officePhone = #{officePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empCustom1 = #{empCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empCustom2 = #{empCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empCustom3 = #{empCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empCustom4 = #{empCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
empCustom5 = #{empCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where empID = #{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ehr_employee set workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eName = #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reportTo = #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empStatus = #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobStatus = #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empType = #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, joinDate = #{joinDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, workBeginDate = #{workBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, jobBeginDate = #{jobBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pracBeginDate = #{pracBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pracEndDate = #{pracEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, probBeginDate = #{probBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, probEndDate = #{probEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, leaveDate = #{leaveDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=INTEGER}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, officePhone = #{officePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empCustom1 = #{empCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empCustom2 = #{empCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empCustom3 = #{empCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empCustom4 = #{empCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, empCustom5 = #{empCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} where empID = #{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from ehr_employee
empID = #{empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
joinDate = #{joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
workBeginDate = #{workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
jobBeginDate = #{jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracBeginDate = #{pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracEndDate = #{pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probBeginDate = #{probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probEndDate = #{probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
leaveDate = #{leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
gender = #{gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officePhone = #{officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom1 = #{empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom2 = #{empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom3 = #{empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom4 = #{empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empCustom5 = #{empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select count(1) from ehr_employee
empID = #{empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
joinDate = #{joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
workBeginDate = #{workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
jobBeginDate = #{jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracBeginDate = #{pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracEndDate = #{pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probBeginDate = #{probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probEndDate = #{probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
leaveDate = #{leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
gender = #{gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officePhone = #{officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom1 = #{empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom2 = #{empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom3 = #{empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom4 = #{empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empCustom5 = #{empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from ehr_employee
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
joinDate = #{model.joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
workBeginDate = #{model.workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
jobBeginDate = #{model.jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracBeginDate = #{model.pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracEndDate = #{model.pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probBeginDate = #{model.probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probEndDate = #{model.probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
leaveDate = #{model.leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
gender = #{model.gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officePhone = #{model.officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom1 = #{model.empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom2 = #{model.empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom3 = #{model.empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom4 = #{model.empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empCustom5 = #{model.empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officePhone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ehr_employee
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
joinDate = #{model.joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
workBeginDate = #{model.workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
jobBeginDate = #{model.jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracBeginDate = #{model.pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracEndDate = #{model.pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probBeginDate = #{model.probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probEndDate = #{model.probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
leaveDate = #{model.leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
gender = #{model.gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officePhone = #{model.officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom1 = #{model.empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom2 = #{model.empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom3 = #{model.empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom4 = #{model.empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empCustom5 = #{model.empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officePhone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select e.*, l.account FROM `view_ehr_employee` e LEFT JOIN `ehr_login` l ON e.`empID` = l.empID
e.empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.joinDate = #{model.joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.workBeginDate = #{model.workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.jobBeginDate = #{model.jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.pracBeginDate = #{model.pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.pracEndDate = #{model.pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.probBeginDate = #{model.probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.probEndDate = #{model.probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.leaveDate = #{model.leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.gender = #{model.gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.officePhone = #{model.officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom1 = #{model.empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom2 = #{model.empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom3 = #{model.empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom4 = #{model.empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.empCustom5 = #{model.empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV1Name = #{model.depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV2Name = #{model.depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV3Name = #{model.depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depAllName = #{model.depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV1ID = #{model.depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depLV2ID = #{model.depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depLV3ID = #{model.depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobName = #{model.jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.reportToWorkNo = #{model.reportToWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.wfreportToWorkNo = #{model.wfreportToWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.reportToName = #{model.reportToName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.wfreportToName = #{model.wfreportToName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(e.depID, #{model.depIDs}) AND
( FIND_IN_SET(e.depID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV1ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV2ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV3ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) ) AND
FIND_IN_SET(e.workNo, #{model.workNos}) AND
!FIND_IN_SET(e.workNo, #{model.workNosExclude}) AND
( e.workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.officePhone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.empCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.depAllName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.jobName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.reportToWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.wfreportToWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.reportToName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.wfreportToName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

SELECT count(1) from view_ehr_employee
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
joinDate = #{model.joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
workBeginDate = #{model.workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
jobBeginDate = #{model.jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracBeginDate = #{model.pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
pracEndDate = #{model.pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probBeginDate = #{model.probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
probEndDate = #{model.probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
leaveDate = #{model.leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
gender = #{model.gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officePhone = #{model.officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom1 = #{model.empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom2 = #{model.empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom3 = #{model.empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empCustom4 = #{model.empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empCustom5 = #{model.empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1Name = #{model.depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV2Name = #{model.depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV3Name = #{model.depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAllName = #{model.depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1ID = #{model.depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV2ID = #{model.depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV3ID = #{model.depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobName = #{model.jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
reportToWorkNo = #{model.reportToWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wfreportToWorkNo = #{model.wfreportToWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
reportToName = #{model.reportToName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
wfreportToName = #{model.wfreportToName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(depID, #{model.depIDs}) AND
( FIND_IN_SET(depID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(depLV1ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(depLV2ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(depLV3ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) ) AND
FIND_IN_SET(workNo, #{model.workNos}) AND
!FIND_IN_SET(workNo, #{model.workNosExclude}) AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officePhone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAllName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or jobName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or reportToWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wfreportToWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or reportToName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or wfreportToName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

SELECT e.*, par.priority AS appraiser_priority, CASE WHEN e2.workNo IS NOT NULL THEN GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(e2.workNo, '-', par.appraiserName) ) ELSE par.appraiserName END AS appraiser_name FROM view_ehr_employee e LEFT JOIN perf_appraiser_relationship par ON e.empID = par.appraiseeId AND par.state = 1 LEFT JOIN view_ehr_employee e2 ON par.appraiserId = e2.empID
e.empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.joinDate = #{model.joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.workBeginDate = #{model.workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.jobBeginDate = #{model.jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.pracBeginDate = #{model.pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.pracEndDate = #{model.pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.probBeginDate = #{model.probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.probEndDate = #{model.probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.leaveDate = #{model.leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.gender = #{model.gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.officePhone = #{model.officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom1 = #{model.empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom2 = #{model.empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom3 = #{model.empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom4 = #{model.empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.empCustom5 = #{model.empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV1Name = #{model.depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV2Name = #{model.depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV3Name = #{model.depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depAllName = #{model.depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.depLV1ID = #{model.depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depLV2ID = #{model.depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depLV3ID = #{model.depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobName = #{model.jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.reportToWorkNo = #{model.reportToWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.wfreportToWorkNo = #{model.wfreportToWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.reportToName = #{model.reportToName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.wfreportToName = #{model.wfreportToName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(e.depID, #{model.depIDs}) AND
( FIND_IN_SET(e.depID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV1ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV2ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) OR FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV3ID, #{model.adminDepIDs}) ) AND
FIND_IN_SET(e.workNo, #{model.workNos}) AND
!FIND_IN_SET(e.workNo, #{model.workNosExclude}) AND
( e.workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.officePhone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.empCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.depAllName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.jobName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.reportToWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.wfreportToWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.reportToName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or e.wfreportToName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
group by e.empID,par.priority
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}
select * from view_ehr_employee where empID = #{id} limit 1
select * from view_ehr_employee where workNo = #{workNo} limit 1

SELECT e.*, l.account FROM `view_ehr_employee` e INNER JOIN `ehr_login` l ON e.`empID` = l.empID AND l.`isDisabled` = 0
e.empID = #{empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.eName = #{eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobID = #{jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.reportTo = #{reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empStatus = #{empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.jobStatus = #{jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empType = #{empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.joinDate = #{joinDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.workBeginDate = #{workBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.jobBeginDate = #{jobBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.pracBeginDate = #{pracBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.pracEndDate = #{pracEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.probBeginDate = #{probBeginDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.probEndDate = #{probEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.leaveDate = #{leaveDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
e.gender = #{gender, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.officePhone = #{officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom1 = #{empCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom2 = #{empCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom3 = #{empCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
e.empCustom4 = #{empCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
e.empCustom5 = #{empCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.account = #{account, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( FIND_IN_SET(e.depID, #{depIDs}) or FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV1ID, #{depIDs}) or FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV2ID, #{depIDs}) or FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV3ID, #{depIDs}) ) AND
( FIND_IN_SET(e.depCode, #{depCodes}) or FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV1Code, #{depCodes}) or FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV2Code, #{depCodes}) or FIND_IN_SET(e.depLV3Code, #{depCodes}) ) AND
FIND_IN_SET(e.jobID, #{jobIDs}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(e.jobCode, #{jobCodes}) AND
